title: 7 awk Commands for Quick Column and Log Analysis
summary: Pull useful values out of text files faster with awk commands for column selection, filters, sums, counts, header skipping, and simple reports.

test_environment.runtime: awk available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Replace the example file names before running the commands.
Use sample files with known delimiters and numeric columns.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/awk_commands_for_quick_column_and_log_analysis.sh with real local files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example file names and confirm field positions before running sums or filters.
